name: Black King Numemon

signature_move.name: Dark Pupil
signature_move.description: 12Fires black beams from its round eyes.Throws poisonous black poop at the enemy.

description: A jet-black Numemon that has established its position as King of the dark trash data world and became a Perfect. It carries a crown it picked up on its back like a shell, and also grew a mustache. As it is dignified, it tries to refrain from poop attacks which violate its dignity, but uses them on impulse. Its Special Move is firing black beams from its round eyes ( Dark Pupil ). Also, its " Poison Mucus ", in which it splashes a liquid that its mouth contains copious amounts of, makes the body smelly and sticky, and poisons it, causing insufferable pain.
